channel.title: Abouts on Engineering Students' Society U of C
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Engineering Students' Society U of C
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2023 Engineering Students Society University of Calgary. All Rights Reserved

item.description:
Year & Major: 3rd Year - Sustainable Systems

This year, I really want to… Run a 10k

Most spontaneous thing I’ve done… Is go cliff diving

My cry-in-the-car song is… Again by Fetty Wap

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Software

Change my mind about… Red Dead Redemption 2 being the greatest video game of all time

This year, I really want to… learn how to play volleyball

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Electrical

I get way too excited about… Lebron James

A life goal of mine is to… Eat a massive bowl of Pho

Change my mind about… Lebron being the GOAT

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Electrical

The one thing you should know about me is… I will always be down to go grab food

I get way too excited about… photobooths

Year & Major: 3rd Year Software Engineering

I get way too excited about… Gaming, specifically Baldur’s Gate 3 and Expedition 33

This year I really want to… Go to an aquarium!

Year & Major: 2rd Year Mechanical Engineering

I get way too excited about… free food

A life goal of mine… is to climb mount everest

Change my mind about… pineapple on pizza

Year & Major: 2nd year Biomedical Engineering

Change my mind about… waffles » pancakes

I get way too excited about… new Taylor Swift albums

A life goal of mine… is to live in a different country

Year & Major: 2nd year Chemical Engineering

The one thing you should know about me is… I love chocolate

I get way too excited about… High School Musical

Change my mind about… Mint shouldn’t be in chocolate

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Electrical

I get way too excited about… new movies and music releases

This year, I really want to… do more outside of my comfort zone

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Electrical

A life goal of mine… Own a company that does something (irrelevant) but also has a speakeasy/cafe beneath it. No, I don’t want to just run a speakeasy/cafe, that’s not the point.

The one thing you should know about me is that I am horribly addicted to Roblox and doomscrolling in any free time

Typical Sunday, playing Roblox

A life goal of mine is to eat a super rare fish, like a fish that was just discovered.

The one thing that you should know about me is that I love doomscrolling on Instagram Reels.

A life goal of mine is to be rich enough to never work again.

The one thing you should know about me is that I HATE being non-chalant. I get way too excited about cheese (even tho i’m lactose), I will see cheese and want it, I will crave cheese, I will dream about cheese. I am made of Cheese. My cry-in-the-car song is literally ANY Daniel Caesar song!!!

This year, I really want to make new friends :)

I get way too excited about Redbull. My favourite thing about Calgary is that there’s way more flavours of Redbull. It’s my comfort food. It’s the only thing you can bribe me with and the only thing that keeps me awake past 5pm.

The one thing you should know about me is I have an unhealthy addiction to video games

I get way too excited about rediscovering songs that I used to spam on repeat

I get way too excited about THE DENVER NUGGETS AKA THE FUTURE 2026 LARRY O’BRIEN TROPHY-HOISTERS AND NIKOLA JOKIĆ FUTURE 2026 4X MVP

This year, I really want to make my little brother come visit and attend some classes with me

I get way too excited about musicals and discussing why mamma mia is the best one

Change my mind about old rock being better than new rock (Spoilers: you wont)

The one thing you should know about me is that I have a crazy sweet tooth and I will follow you anywhere if you offer me snacks or dessert!

I get way too excited about the weekend after a full week of classes

I get way too excited about carpool karaoke

My cry-in-the-car song is The View Between Villages by Noah Kahan

A life goal of mine is to spend a year travelling!

Year & Major: 2nd year Business + Political Science

A typical Sunday consists of… waking up, mourning for Monday, eating dinner, doom scrolling and finally sleeping

I get way too excited about… opening blind boxes

Year & Major: 5th year Mechanical Engineering and Business

I get way too excited about… ESS lore and engineering-themed patches

Most spontaneous thing I’ve done… is studied abroad

A life goal of mine is… to own a Steinway & Sons piano

Year & Major: 2nd year Geomatics Engineering + Software minor

The one thing you should know about me is… I love musicals

I get way too excited about… Goodhost Iced Tea

Year & Major: 3rd Year - Mechanical

The one thing you should know about me is… I’m a hobby collector who needs to do something new every month.

This year, I really want to… touch grass more.

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Mechanical

I get way too excited about… Ranch Dressing

Change my mind about… Wish you were here being the best album of all time

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Electrical

This year, I really want to… make new friends in my major

A life goal of mine is… to be super rich

I get way too excited about… the hunger games movies

Year & Major: 3rd Year - Mechanical

I get way too excited about… Tron 3 & Silksong coming out

This year I really want to… lock in onto the academic grind

Year & Major: 2nd Year Chemical + Business

I get way too excited about… Spikeball

This year, I really want to… meet more people!

A life goal of mine… Backpack through Europe

Year & Major: 2nd Year Software & Aerospace Engineering

My cry-in-the-car song is… Seigfried by Frank Ocean.

My life goal is to… make enough money to never work again and just work on fun projects at home.

Year & Major: 2nd year Civil

Change my mind about… a good matcha is slightly better than a good coffee. But a mid coffee is »»» a mid matcha

A life goal of mine… is to go camping in iceland

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Mechanical

I get way too excited about… airplanes

A life goal of mine is to… see weezer irl

My cry-in-the-car song is… only in dreams by weezer

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Mechanical with MEED minor

I get way too excited about… My car and I will talk about it for hours

Change my mind about… Max Verstappen being the best F1 driver ever (you can’t)

Year & Major: 3rd Year in Mechanical Engineering

I get way too excited about… Revenge of the Sith

Change my mind about… Oscar Piastri being the best F1 driver (you can’t)

Year & Major: 2nd Year Mechanical Engineering

I get way too excited about… snow and winter

Change my mind about… winter being the best season

This year I really want… it to snow more

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Electrical

I get way to excited about… music

A typical Sunday consists of… sleeping until 3pm, doom scrolling, and getting a ton of ice cream

Year & Major: 2nd Year - Chemical

Most spontaneous thing I’ve done… is go to Toronto on a day’s notice by myself.

My cry-in-the-car song is… “Feels” by Tory Lanez ft. Chris Brown

Year & Major: 3rd Year - Mechanical

The one thing you should know about me is… that I love bending moment diagrams.

I get way too excited about… bending moment diagrams.

Year & Major: 3rd Year - Software

The one thing you should know about me is… that I love to talk

Change my mind about… Frank Ocean being the best artist of our generation

item.title: 2025-2026 Council
item.description: The Engineering Students’ Society Council is a group of student volunteers dedicated to the improvement of your time at the Schulich School of Engineering. We are a diverse group of students just like you, doing our best to be leaders for the engineering community here at the UofC. Our Board of Directors consists of the ESS President, 8 portfolio executives, 9 departmental representatives elected by you, and 10 first year representatives. Alongside our commissioners, we advocate on behalf of engineering students to the school, host social and professional events, and provide an array of services aimed at making your time at Schulich enjoyable!

item.title: ESS Membership
item.description: Support the Engineering Students’ Society by becoming a member today! The Engineering Students’ Society works hard to enrich the engineering student experience for all engineering students by hosting a variety of academic, professional, and social events throughout the year. Members will enjoy perks such as discounted events, merchandise discounts, partner discounts, and early access to new ESS products and services.

item.title: Public Documents
item.description: Public documents including our budget, post-activity reports, election information, and more are available on our public Google Drive folder. In addition, the official ESS consititution can be seen below, which contains the ideals, rules, and regulations that the society governs by.
